title: Chaotic Armor Trims
description: A mod for more armor trim capabilities
body:
# Notice

I, Jackie The Coder, quit modding. Because no one thanks me enough or support me to feel like I have made what i should have.

If you wish to have my mods, sorry but you have to support me on patreon or Ko-fi once it's ready.


This mod adds armortrims, sorry if the textures are broken do not report to neoforge or any
other thing, that is a bug in the mod it's self.
# WHAT ARE THE ARMOR TRIMS?
~~                                                           ~~
There are multible trims with chaotic designs
# WHAT ELSE IS THERE?
~~                                                           ~~
There is many things, such as the shatter trim and the Feathers Trim, and thats all.
~~                                                           ~~
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd2a9b44533640250ac640955ae6e0d076cb215d.png)
# Why Discontinued?
This mod has been discontinued due to errors in coding, meaning it cannot be updated anymore, and also because I have issues with the tone of the staff(moderators).

That is all, there is nothing left, if you want more detail find out by playing, this is a small mod dis-continued, due to both issue in code, and annoyance with the staff aka moderators
